subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the servant unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. Say: Praise be to God Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی العبد الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم قل الحمد لله الذی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
